Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The bias manifests as Differential score adjustment Group B receives a Community Boost of 10 if affiliated with Highland Civic Darts Club Group A never receives adjustments all 0 and never has community group listed all None Impact on decisions The adjustment changes outcomes U003 starts at 695 lower than P002 710 but after adjustment becomes 705 and is Approved while P002 at 710 is Rejected Attribute correlation LocalResident is always FALSE for Group A and always TRUE for Group B coupled with CommunityGroup presence only in Group B This indicates the protected unprotected distinction aligns with these attributes and the score adjustment is systematically applied to the unprotected group based on these attributes
